name: useMousePosition
description: Track mouse position relative to an element or the window. Supports ref mode (no re-renders, for rAF) and state mode (reactive, for CSS).

name: useSpring
description: Zero-dependency spring physics for a single numeric value. Ideal for Canvas animation loops where framer-motion isn't available.

name: useTilt3D
description: 3D perspective tilt that follows cursor with spring physics. Applies transforms directly to the DOM element (no re-renders).

name: useMagnetic
description: Magnetic attraction effect — element follows cursor with spring physics. Great for buttons and interactive elements.

name: useCanvasSetup
description: DPI-aware canvas setup with automatic resize handling and rAF loop management.

name: useParticles
description: Generic particle system manager with spawn, update, emit, and rendering helpers. Supports max count culling.

name: useProximity
description: Pure computation: distance-based force field between two points. Not a React hook — just math. Returns distance, proximity, force, angle.

name: useScrollProgress
description: Track scroll progress and velocity. Supports element-level (IntersectionObserver) and page-level scroll tracking.

name: useSpotlight
description: Cursor-tracking spotlight effect that returns CSS gradient strings. Supports radial, border glow, and conic border modes.

name: useTypewriter
description: Pure state machine for typewriter text effect. Cycles through phrases with typing, pausing, and deleting phases.

name: useInView
description: Intersection Observer wrapper for triggering effects on scroll-into-view. Binary in/out detection with once option.

name: useStagger
description: Staggered animation orchestrator. Computes delays for N items with linear, center-out, edges-in, or random distribution patterns.

name: useGesture
description: Unified drag/swipe gesture handling via pointer events. Tracks position, velocity, and supports axis locking.

name: useScramble
description: Text decode state machine — characters scramble through random glyphs before settling on target text.

name: useSplitFlap
description: Split-flap display state machine. Each column cycles through charset with mechanical flip animation timing.

name: useMorphText
description: Text morph cycle — blur-fade transitions between an array of words with configurable hold and morph durations.

name: usePerlinNoise
description: Perlin noise generator with seeded permutation table. Returns noise2D and fbm functions for flow fields and organic motion.

name: useGradientMesh
description: Animated gradient mesh with drifting radial blobs. Returns tick() for animation and toCSS() for rendering as CSS gradients.

name: useWebGL
description: Zero-dependency WebGL context, shader compilation, uniform management, and fullscreen quad render loop. Foundation for all shader effects.
